If you send 1,000,000 emails per month:
- Postmark: $1,206/mo
- Resend: $650/mo
- SendGrid: $600/mo
- Cloudflare: $354/mo
- Amazon SES: $100/mo

So Postmark is now by far the most expensive email provider

And SES and https://t.co/timm3WGDhn

tweets.full_text: It's an unimpressive-sounding word, but one of the most powerful motivations is the motivation of the hobbyist. That's what keeps successful founders working on their companies long past the point when they've made enough to quit. It's their beloved project.
